params.name: page
params.description: Number index of the requested SIM list page. Use this parameter to iterate through all SIMs on the different pages. The total amount of pages is listed in the response header.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Defines the size of a page, the number of individual SIMs listed on one page. The maximum allowed value is 100.

params.name: q
params.description:
Filter parameter in {filter}:{value} format. Expects comma separated list of filtering criteria out of the following fields:
  • imei
  • ip_address

Example: "ip_address:127.0.0.1,imei:4711"

params.name: sort
params.description:
Sort values in a comma seperated list. Prepend "-" for descending sort. Possible values:
  • imei
  • ip_address

Example:"ip_address,-imei"

items.docs: Get a List of SIMs for the current account.

params.name: iccid
params.description: The ICCID of the SIM to be queried.

items.docs: Get detail information (status, label, MSISDN, IMSI, ICCID, Lifetime, etc.) for a singe SIM based on the ICCID.

params.description: The ICCID of the SIM to be changed.

items.docs: Modification of a SIM card to activate, deactivate, change label, change IMEI lock, etc.

items.docs: Get the current SMS quota of a particular SIM.

params.name: iccid
params.description: The ICCID of the SIM to be queried.

items.docs:
Query the current status of a specific SIM card.

This API retrieves connectivity details of a SIM. The following is a list of possible statuses: 
* `ATTACHED`:
    The Endpoint has successfully attached to the Home Core network in the past.
    The device will be shown as `ATTACHED` until the visited network has signaled that the device is inactive/offline.
    Usually the visited network informs the Core Network within 1-2 days after a device went offline.

* `ONLINE`:
    The Endpoint has an

params.name: iccid
params.description: The ICCID of the SIM to be reset.

items.docs: Trigger a connectivity reset for a given SIM. The actual reset will be done asynchronously. A positive-response only means that the connectivity-reset has been successfully placed into the queue.

params.description: The ICCID of the SIM for MT-SMS or MO-SMS.

params.name: page
params.description: The number of returned chunk within the complete set.

params.name: per_page
params.description: The numbers of items to return per page.

params.description: The ID of the SMS message to be cancelled.

params.name: iccid
params.description: The ICCID of the SIM to be queried.

params.name: page
params.description: Number index of the requested SIM event page. Use this parameter to iterate through all SIMs on the different pages. The total amount of pages is listed in the response header.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: The number of events per page, maximum allowed value is 1000.

items.docs: Get diagnostic/event information for a SIM card.

params.name: iccid
params.description: The ICCID of the SIM to be topped up.

params.name: payment_method
params.description: Optional payment method selection between creditcard, banktransfer, monthlyinvoice or boleto. If the parameter is left empty or is invalid, banktransfer is used as default for the top up order process.

items.docs: Top up the data/SMS volume of one specific SIM.
